_handoff.what: Configuration for every trigger detector. Rules, thresholds, and response pools live here so the fill-in instance can tune behavior without touching TypeScript.
_handoff.status: SCAFFOLD — detector word lists are SHORT AND INCOMPLETE on purpose. Expand from authoring DB. Thresholds are conservative defaults; tune after observing real posts.
rules: Detectors err on the side of NOT firing. False positives destroy Gerald.
Every trigger response is governed by ratelimit.ts and cooldown.ts regardless of detector match.
If a trigger is disabled (enabled: false), it is still registered but is a no-op.

new_post.description: Drops 'Filed.' on posts that look like a paper/working-paper. Paper-shape heuristics only — no LLM.

zero_gaps.description: The i-theft port. Fires on posts that assert strong claims with zero epistemic hedging — the textual shape of ego-without-the-asserter.

score_milestone.description: Polls recent posts on each heartbeat. When a post crosses a score threshold, Gerald witnesses once.

napkin_drop.description: Scheduled rare top-level comment on a recent post. Just a napkin. No context.
